name: Maple Kielbasa Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Kielbasa into bite-size pieces.
2. In a bowl, whisk together the maple syrup and mustard until well combined.
3. Dip each piece of Kielbasa into the mixture, ensuring it is evenly coated.
4. Thread the coated kielbasa pieces onto skewers.
5. Heat a grill or griddle over medium heat.
6. Place the skewered kielbasa on the grill and cook for about 3 minutes per side, or until they are browned and heated through.
